title: AB Imperial Heights
description: Premium 40-storey residential skyscraper featuring luxury smart-homes, sustainable green rooftops, and advanced seismic-resistant structural frames.

title: Tech Park Horizon
description: Next-generation B2B IT Hub incorporating pre-engineered steel structures, glass curtain walls, and a dedicated IGBC Platinum-certified ecosystem.

title: Narmada Industrial Corridor
description: Heavy-duty industrial manufacturing assembly plant deploying massive precast concrete girders and specialized high-load flooring solutions.
